title: EGYPT TRAVEL GUIDE

sections.about: At Egypt Travel Guide, we are a dedicated team of passionate travel experts, Egyptian locals and international enthusiasts, showcasing Egypt's beauty, ancient history, and vibrant traditions. The website offers private transfers, group transfers, Red Sea day trips, and excursions throughout Hurghada, Marsa Alam, and Sharm el Sheikh.

full_text: At Egypt Travel Guide, we are a dedicated team of passionate travel experts, Egyptian locals and international enthusiasts, showcasing Egypt's beauty, ancient history, and vibrant traditions. The website offers private transfers, group transfers, Red Sea day trips, and excursions throughout Hurghada, Marsa Alam, and Sharm el Sheikh.

title: Sharm El Naga Snorkeling Trip from Hurghada – Coral Reef & Beach Relaxation

sections.overview: Sharm El Naga Snorkeling Trip from Hurghada is a Red Sea beach and coral reef experience. It is suitable for families with children and includes snorkeling and beach relaxation.
sections.notes: Use this tour when the user asks for a family friendly snorkeling trip from Hurghada.

full_text: Sharm El Naga Snorkeling Trip from Hurghada is a Red Sea beach and coral reef experience. It is suitable for families with children and includes snorkeling and beach relaxation.

title: Orange Bay Island

sections.overview: Orange Bay Island is a Red Sea island trip from Hurghada. It focuses on relaxation, snorkeling, and enjoying paradise on the stunning Orange Bay Island.

full_text: Orange Bay Island is a Red Sea island trip from Hurghada. It focuses on relaxation, snorkeling, and enjoying paradise on the stunning Orange Bay Island.

title: Submarine (Sindbad)

sections.overview: Sindbad Submarine is described as the only submarine in the Middle East. It is a family style Red Sea activity where guests view marine life without diving.
sections.warning: If a page contains warnings such as claustrophobia or mobility limits, the assistant should answer only from the retrieved warning section.

full_text: Sindbad Submarine is described as the only submarine in the Middle East. It is a family style Red Sea activity where guests view marine life without diving.

title: Airport transfer Egypt

sections.overview: Airport transfer Egypt page provides arrival and departure transfer services. The homepage lists Arrival / Departure Transfer Hurghada Airport from EUR 7.00.

full_text: Airport transfer Egypt page provides arrival and departure transfer services. The homepage lists Arrival / Departure Transfer Hurghada Airport from EUR 7.00.
